loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 4 - Smart Packing Checklist & Taiwan City Expansion
status: DONE - All quality gates passed, build clean, tests passing
summary: Iteration 4 improvements: (1) Added SmartPackingChecklist component - context-aware family packing lists that adapt to venue category (park/restaurant/nursing_room/medical), child age in months, and current season. Features checkable items with localStorage persistence, reset functionality, bilingual support (zh/en), and collapsible sections. (2) Added packingChecklist.ts utility with comprehensive Taiwan family item database covering baby essentials, toddler gear, venue-specific items, and seasonal items. (3) Added 31 new tests for SmartPackingChecklist (all passing). (4) Integrated packing checklist into LocationDetailPanel. (5) Expanded seed data with 8 new curated venues across Kaohsiung (3), Taichung (2), Tainan (2), and Hsinchu (1) with full Taiwan-specific metadata. Final state: 2359/2359 client tests passing (+31 new), 93/93 server tests passing, 0 TypeScript errors, build clean.
next_action: Project enhanced - all quality gates still passing with new features

features: Age-aware items (baby vs toddler vs child)
Season-aware items (summer heat vs winter cold vs spring rain)
